# The Grant Desk

A curated database of paid grants, fellowships and residencies for artists, researchers and technologists working in AI and AI safety, digital and mixed-media arts, film and video, research and journalism, tech and infrastructure, and cross-disciplinary practice.

Maintained by Ahnjili ZhuParris. Updated weekly. Almost every entry is funded; a few notable unpaid open calls and festival submissions are included as clearly flagged exceptions.

## Primary

- [The Grant Desk (interactive)](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/): Filterable list of all active grants, fellowships and residencies.
- [All grants RSS feed](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/feed.xml): Full RSS feed of all entries, sorted by date added.
- [All grants calendar (.ics)](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/calendar.ics): ICS calendar of all upcoming deadlines.

## By category

- [AI and AI safety](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/ai/)
- [Tech and infrastructure](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/tech/)
- [Research and journalism](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/research/)
- [Writing and literature](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/writers/)
- [Film and video](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/film/)
- [Visual and media arts](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/arts/)
- [Games and interactive](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/game/)
- [Design](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/design/)
- [Curatorial](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/curator/)
- [Audio and sound art](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/audio/)
- [Cross-disciplinary and social impact](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/cross/)

## By region

- [EU](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/eu/)
- [UK](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/uk/)
- [US](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/us/)
- [Netherlands](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/nl/)
- [Asia](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/asia/)
- [Africa](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/africa/)
- [Canada](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/canada/)
- [Australia](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/australia/)
- [Latin America](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/latam/)
- [Remote (work-from-anywhere)](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/remote/)
- [Worldwide](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/worldwide/)

## Data

- [grants.json](https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/grants.json): Source of truth, machine-readable. Each entry has: id, title, organization, location, region, amount, duration, deadline, addedDate, category, description, url, tags, fee, featured.
